pick.reasoning: The largest model-to-market gap in the top-10 field this week. Putnam is a Colonial regular whose controlled iron game and fairway accuracy match the course's demand profile — 35% approach weight — better than his odds reflect. FanDuel's +850 implies about 10.5% probability; the model puts it closer to 15.6%, a +36.8% edge.
